steps.title: Match hardship to mood
steps.content: The claim requires a quotation showing strenuous conditions affecting the soldiers' collective mood. The support must include both the harsh condition and its effect on the group.

steps.title: Reject scenery-only quotes
steps.content: A describes the landscape, B describes the terrain and travel, and C describes movement through the canyon; none shows the soldiers' mood changing. The quotation in which the sun dulls their minds and bodies and leaves them silent shows hardship changing the group. The answer is D.
